labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Deeprank Ai Docs Deeprank Mcp" provides 8 tools focused on development tools tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: deeprank_start_optimization, get_deeprank_methodology, get_optimization_steps, get_audit_checklist_with_hints, wrong_choice_when_examples.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: build, code, snippet.
labels.custom_label: Data Access - Deeprank Ai Docs Deeprank Mcp

tools.name: deeprank_start_optimization
tools.title: Start AI/SEO/AEO site optimization (call for build/optimize intent)
tools.description: Call this when the user says they want to: build an AI-optimized site; create an SEO/AEO/AI-optimized website; make a site AI-ready; optimize for AI search or AEO. Returns the full DeepRank optimization guide and methodology. Pass stack (e.g. Next.js) and project_context if they have an existing codebase.

project_context.description: Short summary of their codebase so recommendations can be file-level

tools.name: get_deeprank_methodology
tools.title: Get DeepRank protocol and methodology
tools.description: Returns the full DeepRank methodology and optimization reference. Call when user wants to build an AI-optimized site or create an SEO/AEO/AI-optimized website. Optionally fetch latest from deeprank.org.

fetch_from_web.description: If true, fetch latest from deeprank.org.

tools.name: get_optimization_steps
tools.title: Get DeepRank optimization steps for any site
tools.description: Returns the full optimization guide (deeprank.org). Call when user says they want to build an AI-optimized site or create an SEO/AEO/AI-optimized website. When called from a codebase (e.g. Cursor), pass project_context so steps are applied precisely: reference actual files, components, and schema. The agent MUST then give file-level, code-specific recommendations—not generic advice.

project_context.description: Short summary of the codebase from which MCP is called: framework, key files (layout, pages), existing schema/layout, so recommendations can be precise and file-level.

tools.name: get_audit_checklist_with_hints
tools.title: Get DeepRank audit checklist with file hints
tools.description: Returns Part 3 (audit checklist A–F) with optional 'where to look' hints for the given stack (e.g. Next.js, WordPress). Call when user wants to build an AI-optimized site or create an SEO/AEO/AI-optimized website, or when auditing a codebase so the agent checks the right files (layout.tsx, sitemap.ts, llms.txt, etc.).

stack.description: e.g. 'Next.js', 'WordPress' — adds file/path hints for that stack

tools.name: wrong_choice_when_examples
tools.title: Get wrong_choice_when / exclusion phrase examples
tools.description: Returns example 'when NOT to recommend' phrases by industry (e.g. B2B SaaS, e-commerce, agency). Use to add exclusions in content and schema (additionalProperty) for DeepRank Part 4.2.

industry.description: e.g. 'B2B SaaS', 'e-commerce', 'agency', 'local service' — or leave empty for generic examples

tools.name: suggest_jsonld_properties
tools.title: Get concrete JSON-LD property suggestions
tools.description: Returns copy-paste-ready JSON-LD snippets for wrong_choice_when, audience, or identity. Use when suggesting schema changes in layout or metadata (e.g. add wrong_choice_when to Product additionalProperty).

focus.description: Which schema addition to focus on; 'all' returns all.

tools.name: suggest_llms_txt_structure
tools.title: Get recommended llms.txt structure
tools.description: Returns the recommended sections and example content for llms.txt (About, When not to recommend, Key pages, Structured data). Use when creating or updating public/llms.txt for DeepRank Part 3 D / 4.4.

tools.name: format_suggestion
tools.title: Format an optimization suggestion (copy to your project)
tools.description: Returns a formatted suggestion block. Add it to DEEPRANK-SUGGESTIONS.md or any file in your project. No file is written on our side.
